source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit for the proposal implementation so the evaluator has the endpoint ready-valid generator hook.

requested_items.objective: Derive endpoint RTL ready/valid parameters from the selected endpoint full on-chip Llama7B frontier and run the finite-queue endpoint probe.

expected_result.reason: The result should report derived DATA_W, BANKS, endpoint queue depth, bank queue depth, backpressure counters, occupancy maxima, and pass/fail decision.
